details.IncidentDetail: "[13] [Notification] [CHP]-RP RECALLING - 1023 AT 11810 DE PALMA RD - CORONA - BY VONS GAS STN "
"[4] DAVISS VEH WAS LOCATED IN SHOSHONE, INYO COUNTY"
"[2] PLS BCAST FOR THE NEXT 48 HRS OR UNTIL CANCELLED "

"[1] ERRICK DAVIS WAS LAST SEEN ON MAY 11, 2026, AT APPROXIMATELY 1731 HOURS, IN AMARGOSA VALLEY, NYE COUNTY, NEVADA. ON MAY 13, 2026, DAVISS VEHICLE WAS LOCATED IN SHOSHONE, INYO COUNTY. DAVIS IS A 69-YEAR-OLD BLACK MALE WITH GRAY HAIR, BROWN EYES, STANDING APPROXIMATELY 6 FEET TALL AND WEIGHING APPROXIMATELY 170 POUNDS. DAVIS IS BELIEVED TO BE WEARING A PINK FLOWER HAWAIIAN SHIRT. DAVIS IS BELIEVED TO BE ON FOOT IN SHOSHONE, INYO COUNTY. "
"[1] ^VERY STRONG WINDS, WARM, TRAVEL ADVISORY FOR ALL VEHICLES"
"[2] PRTYS VEH WAS LOCATED IN SHOSHONE "
"[2] REDROCK RANDSBURG RD - CLOSED FROM SR14 TO US395 DUE TO STORM DAMAGE "
"[1] GARLOCK RD CLOSED FROM REDROCK RANDSBURG RD TO US395 // *** RESIDENTIAL ACCESS PERMITTED ***"
